response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, performance analysis for AI accelerators, and hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Strong experience with diverse programming languages and technologies
Proven ability to work on complex projects and lead initiatives
Experience with test-driven development and software craftsmanship
concerns: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
No clear background in AI/deep-learning workload expertise
Not directly related to cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization
